design: randomized 2x2x2 supplemental Robbing x Florivory x Pollination assignment
treatment_coding: effect-coded: N=-0.5, Y=+0.5; each main-effect coefficient is an average assigned-treatment contrast across the other two treatment factors within the fitted factorial model

models.outcome_definition: average count of all chasmogamous fruits per plant per day
models.interpretation: randomized-treatment effects on a reproductive component, on the log1p scale; not total lifetime fitness

models.outcome_definition: average count of seeds in each chasmogamous fruit
models.interpretation: randomized-treatment effects on a reproductive component; not total lifetime fitness

guardrails: Treatment coefficients are causal assignment contrasts within this randomized factorial experiment, conditional on the declared model and observed outcome subset.
Do not interpret treatment effects as causal effects of early flower redness or floral tannins.
Do not use either reproductive component as a total lifetime-fitness response or as an estimate of the Part A mixed partial.
Do not drop treatment interactions after inspecting p-values; the full 2x2x2 treatment factorial is retained in every model.
